title: Thermostat
desc: We provide professional thermostat installation, replacement, and troubleshooting services for residential and commercial systems. Our team ensures accurate temperature control and proper integration with HVAC equipment, including smart and programmable thermostats. We diagnose issues, calibrate settings, and upgrade outdated units to improve comfort and energy efficiency, helping you maintain reliable climate control throughout your property year-round.
body:
Thermostats are often one of the most overlooked components of your heating and cooling system. However, the right thermostat can make a significant difference in your system’s efficiency—helping you reduce energy use and save money.

​

We offer a wide selection of thermostats to suit any HVAC system and budget, along with professional installation for reliable performance and peace of mind.

​

Benefits:

- Ease of use: Simple controls make it easy to set and maintain your desired temperature

- Consistent comfort: Reliable operation helps keep your home comfortable at all times

- Classic design: Attractive styles available to complement any home décor

[BOOK AN APPOINTMENT](https://www.quickfast.ca/contact-us)

![Man Adjusting Thermostat](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/11062b_9362e3c7578b4d18b374c951ab8061f9~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_721,h_671,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/11062b_9362e3c7578b4d18b374c951ab8061f9~mv2.jpg)

## Featured Thermostats 🌡️

We offer a wide range of thermostat options, but the models below are among the most popular with our customers. Our team can also help confirm compatibility with your existing HVAC system and guide you in selecting the best option for your comfort and budget.

1

### Nest Learning Thermostat

![\_Nest Learning Thermostat.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/824e75_587c8b9a30fe4d2c843e58839f987d3c~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_274,h_206,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/_Nest%20Learning%20Thermostat.jpg)

We provide certified Google Nest thermostat installations and are proud to be Nest Pros, ensuring expert setup and configuration. This wireless smart thermostat integrates seamlessly with Google Home for optional voice control and smart home automation.

 

Key Features:

- Saves an average of 10%–15% on heating and cooling costs

- Easy setup—learns your preferences within the first week

- Automatically adapts to your schedule, even when it changes

- Remote access and control via smartphone from anywhere

- Energy history reports to track savings over time

- Alerts you to potential system issues early

- Eligible for energy efficiency rebates (where applicable)

- Compatible with other Nest smart home devices

2

### Voice-Enabled Smart Thermostat

![Man Using Smart Panel](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/11062b_0312d0ec90564dd9918aa481f22b42cb~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_290,h_206,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Man%20Using%20Smart%20Panel.jpg)

A smart thermostat with built-in Amazon Alexa voice control lets you adjust your home’s temperature, check the news, or manage everyday tasks like shopping lists—all hands-free. Privacy mode allows you to easily turn off the microphone when not in use.

​

Key Features:

- Saves up to 23% on annual heating and cooling costs

- ENERGY STAR® certified for high efficiency

- Built-in room sensor helps eliminate hot and cold spots

- Optional additional sensors for multi-room comfort control

- Detects occupancy to adjust temperature automatically

- Full remote control from your smartphone, anywhere

- Free energy usage reports to track savings

- Easy-to-use vacation mode for extended absences

- 3-year manufacturer warranty

Why Use Programmable Thermostats? 

 

Programmable thermostats combine the reliability of traditional temperature control with advanced scheduling and smart functionality. They allow you to automatically adjust your home’s temperature based on the time of day and day of the week, helping improve comfort and energy efficiency.

​

With intuitive HD touchscreen controls, managing your home climate becomes simple and convenient. You can control temperature, humidity, and ventilation all from one integrated system—reducing the need for multiple adjustments.

Some models also include guided setup features to help simplify programming, as well as compatibility with portable sensors that allow you to monitor and control comfort from different rooms in your home.

Saves Money.\
The additional functionality of a programmable thermostat allows you to easily cut money off your monthly energy bill.

Environmentally Friendly.\
Because your heating and cooling system is not running as much when you are away, your energy usage will drop.

Simple Settings.\
With clear and easy-to-use menu options, you can set the thermostat effortlessly.

Custom Settings.\
Programmable thermostats offer up to seven different temperature options, including a vacation setting.

Chat with Bella
